inline_comments.message:
The choice should always be "if configured to do http, then do http, else do https". The default MUST be https if there is no configuration to do otherwise. That is, using http must always be a conscious pro-active choice.

Also remove the "@TODO" in the above comment.

> The choice should always be "if configured to do http, then do http, else do https". The default MUST be https if there is no configuration to do otherwise. That is, using http must always be a conscious pro-active choice.
> 
> Also remove the "@TODO" in the above comment.

The change does not remove the configuration option to use HTTP or HTTPS. If "collector.rcc.service.secure.port" is set to 0, it's HTTP otherwise it is HTTPS.
The commented code was not allowing to use HTTP even if this cofiguration parameter was set to 0.
Default remains HTTPS only. If needed, ApplicationSettings.java can be referred to.

I will remove @TODO
